'''Wozwashi Street''' was a road on [[Rishi/Legends|Rishi]].

==History==
In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Number 3 Supply Dump]] was located at 412 Wozwashi Street, near the [[Rishi Base (Talon Karrde)|Rishi Base]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Dark Force Rising 1|''Dark Force Rising'' 1]]
